zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Maxwell於1377年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾波洛可時，她的父親John Maxwell 4th of Pollok40歲，母親Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD39歲。她於大約1400年與Alan Cathcart在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1411年7月24日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Maxwell于1377年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾波洛可时，她的父亲John Maxwell 4th of Pollok40岁，母亲Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD39岁。她于大约1400年与Alan Cathcart在英国苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1411年7月24日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Maxwell was born in 1377, in Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, was 39. She married Alan Cathcart about 1400, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 24 July 1411, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Maxwell est née en 1377, à Pollok, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Cathcart environ 1400, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 juillet 1411, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Maxwell 1377 in Pollok, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Maxwell 4th of Pollok 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD 39. Sie hat um 1400 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alan Cathcart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Juli 1411 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Maxwell è nata il nel 1377 nel Pollok, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Alan Cathcart circa 1400, nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 luglio 1411, nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Maxwellが1377年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアポロクで生まれた時，父John Maxwell 4th of Pollokは40歳，母Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORDは39歳であった。約1400年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートでAlan Cathcartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1411年7月24日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Maxwell(이)가 1377년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 폴로크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Maxwell 4th of Pollok(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 Alan Cathcart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1411년 7월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Maxwell nasceu em 1377, em Pollok, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Cathcart aproximadamente 1400, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de julho de 1411, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Maxwell родилась в 1377 г. в местности поллок, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Maxwell 4th of Pollok было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Cathcart около 1400 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 июля 1411 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Maxwell nació en 1377, en Pollok, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alan Cathcart aproximadamente 1400, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de julio de 1411, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
